title: Resources
description: Manage the models, translation services and GPU acceleration used by your tasks
importInvalidLayout: The selected folder is not a valid model. Missing files: {{files}}

builtin.name: whisper.cpp (built-in)
builtin.desc: Default engine with ggml quantized models and GPU acceleration; specially optimized for Apple silicon (M series) for extra speed, and stays light and smooth on older or low-memory computers.
builtin.scenario: Best for: Mac / older devices / general offline transcription

fasterWhisper.name: faster-whisper
fasterWhisper.desc: CTranslate2-based engine with faster inference; models download from HuggingFace on demand. Fastest on computers with a dedicated NVIDIA GPU, and faster on regular Windows PCs too. First use downloads a self-contained runtime (Python included, nothing else to install).
fasterWhisper.scenario: Best for: NVIDIA GPUs / speed and accuracy
fasterWhisper.downloadedBusyHint: Engine downloaded. A task is running — you can set it as current here once it finishes.
fasterWhisper.computeTypeHint: Numeric precision — trades speed / VRAM / accuracy
fasterWhisper.deviceTooltip:
Auto: pick the best for your hardware (recommended).
CPU: most compatible, slower.
CUDA: requires an NVIDIA GPU, fastest.
fasterWhisper.computeTypeTooltip:
Auto: pick the best for your device (recommended).
int8: lowest memory, fastest, slightly less accurate.
float16: needs a GPU, balanced speed/accuracy.
int8_float16: mixed precision, saves VRAM.
float32: highest accuracy, slowest.

variant.label: Runtime type
variant.cpuDesc: Universal, runs on any machine, small download
variant.cudaDesc: NVIDIA GPU acceleration, bundles CUDA libs (cuBLAS/cuDNN), large download
variant.noNvidia: No NVIDIA GPU detected; GPU acceleration may be unavailable
variant.parkedReady: Local copy kept — switch instantly, no re-download

fasterWhisper.downloadConfirm: This will download the faster-whisper engine runtime (~170MB). Continue?
fasterWhisper.upgradeConfirm: This will download and upgrade the faster-whisper engine runtime. The engine is stopped before upgrading and automatically rolled back to the current version if it fails. Continue?
fasterWhisper.serialNote: To avoid VRAM contention, faster-whisper transcribes serially (concurrency = 1).
fasterWhisper.protocolUnsupported: This engine version requires a newer SmartSub. Please update SmartSub before installing or upgrading the engine.
fasterWhisper.engineBusy: A task is running. Wait for it to finish before installing, upgrading, or uninstalling the engine.
fasterWhisper.checkFailed: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.
fasterWhisper.uninstallConfirm: Uninstalling removes the engine runtime (~170MB); you'll need to download it again to use faster-whisper. Continue?

sherpa.name: Local multi-model engine
sherpa.subtitle: FunASR · Qwen · FireRed
sherpa.desc: FunASR, Qwen3-ASR and FireRedASR share one bundled sherpa-onnx runtime; they differ only in models and a few parameters. Pick and download a model from any family below to start — fully offline on CPU, no GPU or Python required.
sherpa.builtinRuntime: The runtime is bundled with the app (shared by FunASR · Qwen · FireRed) — no separate download needed.
sherpa.needsModels: Download a model from any family to get started
sherpa.numThreadsHint: Threads used for CPU inference — higher is faster but uses more CPU (shared by all three families)
sherpa.itnHint: Converts spoken numbers, dates, etc. into standard written form and restores punctuation
sherpa.itnFunasrOnly: Only supported by FunASR (SenseVoice); Qwen and FireRed handle normalization internally.

funasr.name: FunASR
funasr.builtinRuntime: The runtime is bundled with the app — no download needed.
funasr.desc: Alibaba DAMO Chinese/multilingual ASR engine on sherpa-onnx: SenseVoice multilingual and Paraformer for Chinese, with built-in punctuation and inverse text normalization. Runs smoothly on CPU — no GPU required.
funasr.scenario: Best for: Chinese / Cantonese / JA-KO, high accuracy on CPU
funasr.downloadConfirm: This will download the FunASR engine package (~{{size}}). Continue?
funasr.downloadRuntimeConfirm: This will download the FunASR runtime library (~{{size}}) for fully offline, local transcription — no Python required. Continue?
funasr.upgradeConfirm: This will download and upgrade the FunASR runtime library. The engine is stopped before upgrading and automatically rolled back if it fails. Continue?
funasr.uninstallConfirm: Uninstalling removes the runtime; you'll need to download it again to use FunASR. Continue?
funasr.engineBusy: A task is running. Wait for it to finish before installing, upgrading, or uninstalling the engine.
funasr.checkFailed: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.
funasr.protocolUnsupported: This engine version requires a newer SmartSub. Please update SmartSub before installing or upgrading the engine.
funasr.anotherDownload: Another download is in progress. Please wait for it to finish.
funasr.itnHint: Converts spoken numbers, dates, etc. into standard written form and restores punctuation
funasr.numThreadsHint: Threads used for CPU inference — higher is faster but uses more CPU

sensevoice-small.name: SenseVoice-Small (~230MB)
sensevoice-small.desc: Multilingual model (ZH / Yue / EN / JA / KO) with punctuation and emotion

paraformer-zh.name: Paraformer Chinese (~230MB)
paraformer-zh.desc: Chinese-specialized model (ZH+EN) with high Chinese accuracy and speed

silero-vad.name: Silero VAD (~2MB)
silero-vad.desc: Voice activity detection for auto-segmenting long audio

qwen.name: Qwen3-ASR
qwen.builtinRuntime: The runtime is bundled with the app (shared with FunASR) — no download needed.
qwen.desc: Alibaba Qwen3-ASR (0.6B) running locally on the sherpa-onnx runtime (shared with FunASR). Open-source, multilingual, CPU-friendly — no GPU or Python required. Segment-level timestamps come from VAD.
qwen.scenario: Best for: multilingual local transcription on CPU, Apache-2.0
qwen.desc.runtimeShared: Qwen3-ASR shares the sherpa-onnx runtime with FunASR. Installing or uninstalling it here affects both engines.
qwen.downloadRuntimeConfirm: This will download the sherpa-onnx runtime library (~{{size}}) shared with FunASR, for fully offline local transcription. Continue?
qwen.upgradeConfirm: This will download and upgrade the shared sherpa-onnx runtime. The engine is stopped before upgrading and automatically rolled back if it fails. Continue?
qwen.uninstallConfirm: Uninstalling removes the shared sherpa-onnx runtime; FunASR will also need it re-downloaded. Continue?
qwen.engineBusy: A task is running. Wait for it to finish before installing, upgrading, or uninstalling the engine.
qwen.checkFailed: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.
qwen.anotherDownload: Another download is in progress. Please wait for it to finish.
qwen.providerNote: Current scope: CPU only (0.6B). GPU support is planned for a future release.
qwen.numThreadsHint: Threads used for CPU inference — higher is faster but uses more CPU
qwen.modelDownloadConfirm: Qwen3-ASR (0.6B) is about {{size}}. It runs on CPU but is not real-time. Continue?

modelSourceHint.modelscope: Mainland China CDN, fastest; per-file download, no extraction (recommended)
modelSourceHint.ghproxy: GitHub via gh-proxy.com; downloads archive then extracts
modelSourceHint.github: Direct GitHub; faster on overseas networks; downloads archive then extracts

qwen3-asr-0.6b.name: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B (int8, ~0.95GB)
qwen3-asr-0.6b.desc: Multilingual local ASR; int8 quantized, CPU-friendly. Segment-level timestamps via VAD.

fireRedAsr.name: FireRedASR
fireRedAsr.builtinRuntime: The runtime is bundled with the app (shared with FunASR) — no download needed.
fireRedAsr.desc: Xiaohongshu FireRedASR-AED (Large) running locally on the sherpa-onnx runtime (shared with FunASR). Open-source, strong on Chinese-English code-switching and Chinese dialects — no GPU or Python required. Segment-level timestamps come from VAD.
fireRedAsr.scenario: Best for: Chinese-English code-switching / Chinese dialects on CPU, Apache-2.0
fireRedAsr.desc.runtimeShared: FireRedASR shares the sherpa-onnx runtime with FunASR. Installing or uninstalling it here affects both engines.
fireRedAsr.downloadRuntimeConfirm: This will download the sherpa-onnx runtime library (~{{size}}) shared with FunASR, for fully offline local transcription. Continue?
fireRedAsr.upgradeConfirm: This will download and upgrade the shared sherpa-onnx runtime. The engine is stopped before upgrading and automatically rolled back if it fails. Continue?
fireRedAsr.uninstallConfirm: Uninstalling removes the shared sherpa-onnx runtime; FunASR will also need it re-downloaded. Continue?
fireRedAsr.engineBusy: A task is running. Wait for it to finish before installing, upgrading, or uninstalling the engine.
fireRedAsr.checkFailed: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.
fireRedAsr.anotherDownload: Another download is in progress. Please wait for it to finish.
fireRedAsr.providerNote: Current scope: CPU only. GPU support is planned for a future release.
fireRedAsr.numThreadsHint: Threads used for CPU inference — higher is faster but uses more CPU
fireRedAsr.modelDownloadConfirm: FireRedASR-AED (Large) is about {{size}}. It runs on CPU but is not real-time. Continue?

modelSourceHint.modelscope: Mainland China CDN, fastest; per-file download, no extraction (recommended)
modelSourceHint.ghproxy: GitHub via gh-proxy.com; downloads archive then extracts
modelSourceHint.github: Direct GitHub; faster on overseas networks; downloads archive then extracts

fire-red-asr-large-zh-en.name: FireRedASR-AED-L (int8, ~1.7GB)
fire-red-asr-large-zh-en.desc: Strong Chinese-English code-switching and Chinese dialects; int8 quantized, CPU-friendly. Segment-level timestamps via VAD.

localCli.name: Local CLI
localCli.desc: Use a self-installed Whisper-compatible command-line tool
localCli.scenario: Best for: advanced users with their own Whisper CLI and models
localCli.enableHint: Once enabled, the local CLI appears in a task's Engine ▸ Model selector
localCli.commandHint: A Whisper-compatible command runnable in your shell; you provide the model and arguments
localCli.commandTooltip: Available variables: ${audioFile}, ${whisperModel}, ${srtFile}, ${sourceLanguage}, ${outputDir}. These will be replaced with actual values when executing.

cloudAsr.intro: Audio is uploaded to the endpoint you configure during transcription; credentials are stored locally only.
cloudAsr.addCustomDesc: Connect any OpenAI-compatible transcription endpoint (/audio/transcriptions), such as a self-hosted service or proxy.
cloudAsr.baseUrlOptional: Base URL (optional, can be set later)
cloudAsr.clearConfigDesc: This removes the saved credentials and settings for "{{name}}" and resets it to unconfigured. This cannot be undone.
cloudAsr.orphanHint: This provider type is no longer supported. The entries below are legacy configurations — view or remove only.
cloudAsr.testFailed: Connection failed. Check the Base URL and API key.
cloudAsr.testFailedStatus: Connection failed (HTTP {{status}}). Check the Base URL and API key.
cloudAsr.testNeedsConfig: Enter Base URL and API key first.
cloudAsr.removeDesc: Remove cloud ASR configuration "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
cloudAsr.modelsAddHint: Type a model id, press Enter to add

asrApiUrlTips: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1
asrApiKeyTips: Your API key. Stored locally and sent only to the endpoint above.
asrApiKeyTips_openai: OpenAI API Key — sign up and create one at the OpenAI platform ▸ API keys. Stored locally and sent only to the endpoint above.
asrApiKeyTips_groq: Groq API Key — sign up and create one for free in the Groq console ▸ API Keys. Stored locally and sent only to the endpoint above.
asrApiKeyTips_siliconflow: SiliconFlow API Key — sign up and create one in the SiliconFlow console ▸ API keys. Stored locally and sent only to the endpoint above.
asrModelsTips: Type a model id and press Enter to add (e.g. whisper-1, gpt-4o-transcribe); multiple allowed. The first is used by default.
asrRequestTimeoutTips: Max seconds to wait for each request before it fails.
asrConcurrencyTips: Max parallel requests when long audio is split into chunks.
asrRequestIntervalTips: Minimum seconds between requests to respect rate limits (0 = no limit).
asrElevenApiKeyTips: ElevenLabs API Key — sign up and create one at the ElevenLabs console ▸ API Keys. Stored locally only.
asrApiUrlElevenTips: Base URL of the ElevenLabs endpoint. Leave empty to use the official https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1 (set it only if you use a proxy).
asrModelsElevenTips: Toggle the models to enable; the first selected is used by default. scribe_v1 is deprecated (removal announced for July 2026) — prefer scribe_v2.
asrDeepgramApiKeyTips: Deepgram API Key — sign up and create one in the Deepgram console; new accounts include free credits. Stored locally only.
asrApiUrlDeepgramTips: Base URL of the Deepgram endpoint. Leave empty to use the official https://api.deepgram.com/v1 (set it only if you use a proxy).
asrModelsDeepgramTips: Toggle the models to enable; the first selected is used by default. nova-2 covers more languages, nova-3 is more accurate.
asrVolcApiKeyTips: API Key issued under "API Key management" in the Volcengine Doubao Speech console (new console); activate the flash file-recognition model (volc.bigasr.auc_turbo) under "Service activation" first. Note: Volcano Ark / LLM-inference API keys will NOT work. Stored locally only.
asrModelsVolcTips: Model is fixed to bigmodel (Doubao large ASR model, flash file recognition) and cannot be changed.
asrApiUrlVolcTips: Volcengine speech endpoint. Default https://openspeech.bytedance.com — usually no need to change.
asrTencentAppidTips: AppID (numeric) from API key management in the Tencent Cloud console. Sign up and activate "Recording File Recognition (Flash)" in the ASR console first; 5 free hours per month included. Stored locally only.
asrTencentSecretIdTips: SecretId of your Tencent Cloud API key, from the same "API key management" page. Stored locally only.
asrTencentSecretKeyTips: SecretKey of your Tencent Cloud API key. On auth failures (code 4002), double-check the key and your system clock — a skew over 3 minutes breaks the request signature. Stored locally only.
asrModelsTencentTips: The recognition language follows the task's source-language selection automatically — here you only pick the billing tier: standard uses per-language engines (free concurrency 20); large is the LLM-based tier with better accuracy at a higher price (Chinese/English/Cantonese via 16k_zh_en, other languages via 16k_multi_lang, free concurrency capped at 5). With source language set to Auto, a Chinese/English/Cantonese mixed engine is used — pick an explicit source language for other languages.
asrAliyunAccessKeyIdTips: AccessKey ID created under Alibaba Cloud RAM "AccessKey" management. Note: the flash file-recognition service is commercial-only (no free trial) — activate the commercial edition in the Intelligent Speech Interaction console first; usage is billed by audio duration. Stored locally only.
asrAliyunAccessKeySecretTips: AccessKey Secret paired with the AccessKey ID (visible only at creation — keep it safe). Used to obtain temporary access tokens. Stored locally only.
asrAliyunAppkeyTips: Appkey of a project created under "All projects" in the Intelligent Speech Interaction console. The recognition language is set in the project's feature configuration (the task's source language has no effect for Alibaba); the default Mandarin model also handles mixed Chinese-English. For other languages, switch the project's model in the console.
asrModelsAliyunTips: Model is fixed to flash (flash file recognition) and cannot be changed; the actual recognition language and model are determined by the Appkey project's console configuration.
asrXfyunAppidTips: APPID from the app's "Service API authentication" panel — see the transcription service page in the iFlytek console. Sign up at the iFlytek Open Platform, create an app and activate the "LLM Audio File Transcription" service first (billed by audio duration; new users get a free trial quota). Stored locally only.
asrXfyunApiKeyTips: APIKey from the console's "Service API authentication" panel (maps to the API parameter accessKeyId). Stored locally only.
asrXfyunApiSecretTips: APISecret from the console's "Service API authentication" panel (maps to the API parameter accessKeySecret). On signature failures (code 100009) double-check this value; a large system-clock skew causes code 100008. Stored locally only.
asrModelsXfyunTips: Language tier (both tiers auto-detect the language; the task's source language is only validated against the tier before upload): autodialect covers Chinese, English and 202 Chinese dialects (incl. Cantonese) — available once the service is activated; autominor covers 37 languages — Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Russian, French, Spanish, Arabic, German, Thai, Vietnamese, Hindi, Portuguese, Italian, Malay, Indonesian, Filipino, Turkish, Greek, Czech, Urdu, Bengali, Tamil, Ukrainian, Kazakh, Uzbek, Polish, Mongolian, Swahili, Hausa, Persian, Dutch, Swedish, Romanian, Bulgarian, Uyghur and Tibetan — but requires a separate activation via iFlytek sales; do not select it unless activated. Transcription is an async order: after upload the server processes in a queue and the app polls for results automatically; quitting the app mid-task loses nothing — rerunning the same task resumes the existing order without double billing.
asrGladiaApiKeyTips: API Key created under "API Keys" in the app.gladia.io console. The free tier includes 10 hours of transcription per month; note that audio uploaded on the free tier may be used by Gladia for model training (paid tiers are not). Stored locally only.
asrModelsGladiaTips: Model tier (both tiers auto-detect the language; an explicitly set task source language is sent as a hint): solaria-1 (default) covers 100+ languages (incl. Chinese, Japanese, Korean) with the broadest coverage; solaria-3 is specialized for real-world recordings in five European languages (English, French, German, Spanish, Italian) — stronger on noisy calls and multi-speaker audio, but weaker than solaria-1 on clean speech and other languages, so don't pick it by default. Transcription is an async job: after upload the server processes in a queue and the app polls for results automatically; quitting the app mid-task loses nothing — rerunning the same task resumes the existing job without double billing.
asrApiUrlGladiaTips: Base URL of the Gladia endpoint; usually leave empty to use the official https://api.gladia.io (only set when going through a reverse proxy).
